summary:
Deucravacitinib is effective for moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasi s due to its ability to achieve strong PASI 75 response rates and provide substantial symptomatic relief, as demonstrated in clinical studies. This effect translates into improved lesion clearance and enhanced quality of life for patients.
